mapper.select: select TCS2.id, TCS2.company_id, to_char(TCS2.company_name) company_name, to_char(TCS2.statement_no) statement_no, TCS2.customer_id, to_char(TCS2.customer_name) customer_name, decode(TCS2.TYPE,'10','包干费','20','包干费陆集陆疏') type, TCS2.handoverlist_id, to_char(TBH.SHIP_NAME) ship_voyage, to_char(TCS2.cargo_name) cargo_name , cast(TCS2D.bill_quantity as NUMBER(12, 4)) bill_quantity, cast(TCS2D.amount as NUMBER(12, 4)) AMOUNT, to_char(TCS2.create_by_name) create_by_name, to_char(TCS2.create_time,'yyyy-MM-dd hh24:mi:ss') create_time, to_char(TCS2.trade_type) trade_type, null start_date, null end_date, decode(to_char(TCS2.status),'10', '生产结算','20','计费待审核','30','计费审核','31','商务确认','40','部分开票','50','已开票' ) status, '' process_name, TBH.cargo_info_id , TBCI2.CARGO_INFO_NO, to_char(TCS2.statement_time,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') statement_time, to_char(TCS2.statement_by_name) statement_by_name, to_char(TCS2.reject_by_name) reject_by_name, to_char(TCS2.reject_time,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') reject_time, to_char(TCS2.reject_reason) reject_reason from T_COST_STATEMENT TCS2 left join T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST TBH on TCS2.HANDOVERLIST_ID = TBH.ID left join T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI2 on TBH.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI2.ID left join (select STATEMENT, cast(sum(T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL."NUMBER") as number(12,4)) bill_quantity, sum(AMOUNT) amount FROM T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL group by STATEMENT) TCS2D on TCS2.ID = TCS2D.STATEMENT where TCS2.TYPE in ('10','20') and TCS2.status < '30' and TCS2.REJECT_REASON is not null union select TMB.id, TMB.company_id, to_char(TMB.company_name) company_name, to_char(TCS.statement_no) statement_no, TMB.customer_id, to_char(TBC.customer_name) customer_name, '杂项计费' type, null handoverlist_id, TMB.ship_voyage, to_char(TBCI.CARGO_NAME) cargo_name, cast(TMB.bill_quantity AS NUMBER(12, 4)) bill_quantity, cast( TMB.amount_money as NUMBER(12,4)) AMOUNT, to_char(TMB.create_by_name) create_by_name, to_char(TMB.create_time,'yyyy-MM-dd hh24:mi:ss') create_time, '' trade_type, null start_date, null end_date, decode(to_char(TMB.STATUS) ,'10','待计费','20','计费待审核') status, TMB.process_name, TMB.cargo_info_id, TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO CARGO_INFO_NO, to_char(TMB.statement_time,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') statement_time, to_char(TMB.statement_by_name) statement_by_name, to_char(TMB.reject_by_name) reject_by_name, to_char(TMB.reject_time,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') reject_time, to_char(TMB.reject_reason) reject_reason from T_MISC_BILLING TMB left join T_COST_STATEMENT TCS on TMB.STATEMENT_ID = TCS.ID left join T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI on TBCI.id = TMB.CARGO_INFO_ID left join T_BUS_CUSTOMER TBC on TBC.ID = TMB.CUSTOMER_ID where (tcs.status is null or TCS.status < '30') and TMB.REJECT_REASON is not null union select TCSS.id, TCSS.company_id, to_char(TCSS.company_name) company_name, '' statement_no, TCSS.cargo_owner_id as customer_id, to_char(TCSS.cargo_owner_name) as customer_name, '堆存费' type, TCSS.handoverlist_id handoverlist_id, '' ship_voyage, to_char(TBCI3.CARGO_NAME) CARGO_NAME, cast('0.0000' as number(12,4)) bill_quantity, cast(TCSS.amount as number(12,4)) amount, to_char(TCSS.create_by_name) create_by_name, to_char(TCSS.create_time,'yyyy-MM-dd hh24:mi:ss') create_time, '' trade_type, TCSS.start_date, TCSS.end_date, decode(TCSS.status,'10','已计费','20','已审核') status, '' process_name, TBCI3.id cargo_info_id, TBCI3.CARGO_INFO_NO CARGO_INFO_NO, to_char(TCSS.create_by_name) as statement_by_name, to_char(TCSS.create_time,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') statement_time, to_char(TCSS.reject_by_name) reject_by_name, to_char(TCSS.reject_time,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') reject_time, to_char(TCSS.reject_reason) reject_reason from T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE TCSS left join T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI3 on TBCI3.id = TCSS.CARGO_INFO_ID left join T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL TCSD on TCSS.id = TCSD.BUSINESS_ID where TCSS.REJECT_REASON is not null and TCSD.id is null
